ccel.title: ANF01. The Apostolic Fathers with Justin Martyr and Irenaeus

title: XV.

source.title: ANF01. The Apostolic Fathers with Justin Martyr and Irenaeus

verses.book: Fragments from the Lost Writings of Irenæus
verses.text: When, in times of old, Balaam spake these things in parables, he was not acknowledged; and now, when Christ has appeared and fulfilled them, He was not believed.

verses.book: Fragments from the Lost Writings of Irenæus
verses.text: Wherefore [Balaam], foreseeing this, and wondering at it, exclaimed, “Alas! alas! who shall live when God brings these things to pass?”
